title: lasiandra martiana f. frigidula
intro: Lasiandra martiana f. frigidula is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family and also known as the coffee family. The plant is native to the tropical regions of the Americas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Lasiandra martiana f. frigidula have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
